description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image. Add a pages job that runs in the default stage, executing the commands: uname -a; python -V; pip -V, then pip install -r requirements.txt, then make -C docs html, then mv docs/_build/html/ public/. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact and to run only on the master branch. This will generate a GitLab Pages site from the built documentation.
